Nord: A noble race of warriors from the nothern lands beyond the Coldstar Mountains. Nords are strong tall humans with a pale complextion. Nord society operates on respect and honour.
Vivique: The Vivique vivi often called Rat Men, are large quasi intelligent bipedal rodent creatures. They are detestable vile creatures disliked by all races. The Vivi do not cultivate anything on their own, they instead only pillage and steal from others. This war centric culture and their natural speed results in Vivi being excellent warriors, often working as mercenaries.
